description:
Try Cantina for Free Today - https://dub.sh/Cantina #CantinaPartner

In this video, I break down the only 6 Claude skills you actually need to 10x your projects. If you're using Claude Code, Claude Cowork or Claude Projects, there are my favorite Claude skills to use because it's all about creating a system in Claude that makes you work faster and get 10x better output. I walk through all 6 in the exact order I use them by building a personal fitness trainer project from scratch, so you can copy the same workflow for anything you're working on.

Timestamps:
(0:00) - Skill 1: Web Scraping (Discover the data)
(0:59) - Skill 2: /ingest-source (Capture into your knowledge base)
(4:11) - Skill 3: /improve-system (Compound over time)
(6:04) - Skill 4: /ask-the-board (Your board of advisors)
(7:49) - Skill 5: /internal-focus-group (Test before you ship)
(10:39) - Skill 6: Compound Engineering (Actually ship it)
(12:13) - Methodical Approach

--------
FOR INDIVIDUALS:
- Free 5-day AI playbook (what I used to build a $25M+ startup): https://the-ai-playbook.com/6sk
- Use BuildPartner to build 10x faster with Claude Code (try free): https://buildpartner.ai/6sk

FOR BUSINESSES, Ways to work with me:
- Apply for my Executive AI Coaching Program: https://www.theincubator.xyz/apply/6sk
- Want to build a SaaS product without hiring a CTO? https://www.theincubator.xyz/eng/6sk

ADDITIONAL LINKS:
Exa AI: https://exa.ai/
Firecrawl: https://firecrawl.link/austin-marchese
--------



If you're new here, I'm Austin Marchese. How I got here...
16: First business (SAT Math Tutor)
22: Graduated Stevens Tech, 4.0, College Basketball, software engineering job at JPM
23: Bitcoin ATM company + building algorithms for a professional gambler (fun story)
24: Started creating content, grew 100k+ followers, built first agency, The Incubator
25: Scaled agency to 15+ team members, $75K/M while working full time
26: Quit my job, joined a startup called IYK
27: Became COO of a $25M+ tech startup, worked with Ed Sheeran, Chance the Rapper and more
28: Built a $20M+ real estate portfolio in the background
29: Transitioned from IYK, re-launched The Incubator, grew it to a 6-figure biz in 30 days. Now building BuildPartner.ai

To everyone who's spending time learning and putting the work in, cheers. Anyone can make comments from the sidelines but not everyone can build...

- Austin

Follow/Subscribe
